clinical_criteria: Exclude pharmacologic stress tests using CPT codes J0152, J0150, J1245, J1250
Cardiac stress test detected by ECG codes (93015, 93016, 93017, 93018) combined with Echo (93350), nuclear test (A9500), or oxygen uptake (94680, 94681)
Comorbid conditions detected within time frame [-anytime, test date, +1year]
CHD codes detected ≥ 2 times in different years
CHF codes detected ≥ 2 times in different years
PAD codes given as primary or secondary diagnose
COPD codes given as primary or secondary diagnose
algorithm_summary: This algorithm identifies patients with cardiorespiratory fitness assessments by: 1) Excluding records with pharmacologic stress test codes, 2) Identifying cardiac exercise stress tests using combinations of ECG, Echo, nuclear test, and oxygen uptake CPT codes on the same date, 3) Flagging comorbid conditions (CHD, CHF, cardiomyopathy, PAD, COPD) using ICD-9 codes within a specific time window around the test date, with frequency requirements for CHD and CHF (≥2 times in different years). The algorithm categorizes patients into different stress test types (S1-S5) and comorbidity flags (F1-F6) for phenotype characterization.
